system.description:
When you **_strike down a spirit or demon_**, ask the GM for one of its moves and write it down; it is held in the Twisted Spear. When you **_use the stolen move_**, roll +CON: **on a 10+**, you do it, just like that; **on a 7-9**, you do it, but choose 1:
- The move is lost, bleeding away from the Spear
- Mark a consequence
